phrases.intent_en: Ask where the local craft vendor corner is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o canto dos artesãos?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FEE-kah oo KAN-too doosh ar-tay-ZOYNS? (link: oo-KAN-too)
phrases.cultural_note: Artisans are grouped near the historic iron pillars for easy navigation.

likely_response.local: Fica perto das barracas de Bolo Lêvedo.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUHSH buh-RAH-kuhsh DIH BOH-loo LEH-vih-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: It is near the Bolo Lêvedo stalls.

responses.english: It is near the Bolo Lêvedo stalls.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUHSH buh-RAH-kuhsh DIH BOH-loo LEH-vih-doo.
responses.french: Fica perto das barracas de Bolo Lêvedo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Queijo São Jorge counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão do Queijo São Jorge?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DOO KAY-zhoo SOWN ZHAW-ruh-zhih?
phrases.cultural_note: Protected designation cheese is sold at dedicated counters near the produce aisle.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um vendedor na secção de laticínios.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR NUH SEH-sown DIH luh-tee-SEE-neeoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a vendor in the dairy section.

responses.english: Ask a vendor in the dairy section.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR NUH SEH-sown DIH luh-tee-SEE-neeoosh.
responses.french: Pergunte a um vendedor na secção de laticínios.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso pesar os produtos frescos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo pih-ZAHR OOSH proo-DOO-toosh FREHSH-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Scales are provided directly at each produce stand for customer use.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o balcão de Queijo São Jorge?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW bahl-KOWN DIH KAY-zhoo SOWN ZHAW-ruh-zhih?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the local craft vendor corner is
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro o canto de artesanato local?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee en-KON-troo ah AH-reh-ah jee ar-te-sah-NA-toh lo-KAHL [de→jee]
phrases.cultural_note: Local artisans gather in this specific corner during morning market hours.

likely_response.local: O canto de artesanato local fica perto da estrutura do telhado de ferro histórico.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW KAHNNG-too DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH shtroo-TOO-ruh DOO teh-LYAH-doo DIH FEH-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: The local craft vendor corner is near the historic iron roof structure.

responses.english: The local craft vendor corner is near the historic iron roof structure.
responses.phonetic: AW KAHNNG-too DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH shtroo-TOO-ruh DOO teh-LYAH-doo DIH FEH-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
responses.french: O canto de artesanato local fica perto da estrutura do telhado de ferro histórico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get cash exchange
phrases.cultural_note: A cash exchange booth operates near the main market exit for tourist convenience.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um vendedor onde fica o câmbio.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KAHNMB-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a vendor where the currency exchange is.

responses.english: Ask a vendor where the currency exchange is.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KAHNMB-yoo.
responses.french: Pergunte a um vendedor onde fica o câmbio.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso pesar os produtos que comprei?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo pih-ZAHR OOSH proo-DOO-toosh KIH koomp-RAY?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um vendedor nas bancas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR NUHSH BAHNNG-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Where can I weigh the products I bought? Ask a vendor at the stalls.

responses.english: Where can I weigh the products I bought? Ask a vendor at the stalls.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR NUHSH BAHNNG-kuhsh.
responses.french: Pergunte a um vendedor nas bancas.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso pesar os meus produtos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo pih-ZAHR OOSH MEHOOSH proo-DOO-toosh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vendedor ou ao caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR OHW OW KEYE-shuh.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR OHW OW KEYE-shuh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao vendedor ou ao caixa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cash exchange booth is
phrases.cultural_note: Cash exchange booths are common in markets for tourists; point to the south exit area.

likely_response.local: Ao fundo, perto da saída sul.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW FOONNG-doo, PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh SOOW.
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, near the south exit.

responses.english: At the back, near the south exit.
responses.phonetic: OW FOONNG-doo, PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh SOOW.
responses.french: Ao fundo, perto da saída sul.
